name: Stir-Fried Bok Choy in Garlic Oil
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Bok choy - cut into 1-in pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. HEAT THE WOK over a high flame for 1 minute.
2. Add the oil, and when the oil is very hot (this will take just a few seconds; pass your hand over it to feel the heat, or look for a wisp of smoke), add the salt, garlic, and bok choy.
3. Stir-fry until the vegetables are cooked through but still crisp, about 2-3 minutes.
4. A common mistake is to skimp on oil in stir-frying vegetables, which makes them dry out and burn. Use enough oil to coat the vegetables thinly but thoroughly.
5. This may be prepared in advance and served cold.
